title: Routing-Based Continual Learning for Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: arXiv:2511.01831v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) struggle with continual learning, often suffering from catastrophic forgetting when adapting to sequential tasks. title: Experience Transfer for Multimodal LLM Agents in Minecraft Game
summary: arXiv:2604.05533v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Multimodal LLM agents operating in complex game environments must continually reuse past experience to solve new tasks efficiently. title: HybridKV: Hybrid KV Cache Compression for Efficient Multimodal Large Language Model Inference
summary: arXiv:2604.05887v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have advanced unified reasoning over text, images, and videos, but their inference is hindered by the rapid growth of key-value (KV) caches. summary: arXiv:2604.05939v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise in simulating human behavior, yet existing agents often exhibit behavioral rigidity, a flaw frequently masked by the self-referential bias of current "LLM-as-a-judge" evaluations.
